patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVNSink.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVNSink.cpp
index 2058df33ea33..c7153032ec1c 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVNSink.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVNSink.cpp
@@ -548,12 +548,15 @@ private:
     if (isa<PHINode>(I) || I->isEHPad() || isa<AllocaInst>(I) ||
         I->getType()->isTokenTy())
       return true;
+    // Inline assembly cannot be used as a PHI node value.
+    if (auto *CI = dyn_cast<CallInst>(I))
+      if (CI->isInlineAsm())
+        return true;
+    if (auto *II = dyn_cast<InvokeInst>(I))
+      if (II->isInlineAsm())
+        return true;
     return false;
   }
-
-  /// The main heuristic function. Analyze the set of instructions pointed to by
-  /// LRI and return a candidate solution if these instructions can be sunk, or
-  /// std::nullopt otherwise.
   std::optional<SinkingInstructionCandidate>
   analyzeInstructionForSinking(LockstepReverseIterator<false> &LRI,
                                unsigned &InstNum, unsigned &MemoryInstNum,
test_traj:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVNSink.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVNSink.cpp
index 2058df33ea33..1e05d6a6b490 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVNSink.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVNSink.cpp
@@ -548,20 +548,12 @@ private:
     if (isa<PHINode>(I) || I->isEHPad() || isa<AllocaInst>(I) ||
         I->getType()->isTokenTy())
       return true;
+    // Inline assembly cannot be used as a PHI node value.
+    if (auto *CB = dyn_cast<CallBase>(I))
+      if (CB->isInlineAsm())
+        return true;
     return false;
   }
-
-  /// The main heuristic function. Analyze the set of instructions pointed to by
-  /// LRI and return a candidate solution if these instructions can be sunk, or
-  /// std::nullopt otherwise.
-  std::optional<SinkingInstructionCandidate>
-  analyzeInstructionForSinking(LockstepReverseIterator<false> &LRI,
-                               unsigned &InstNum, unsigned &MemoryInstNum,
-                               ModelledPHISet &NeededPHIs,
-                               SmallPtrSetImpl<Value *> &PHIContents);
-
-  /// Create a ModelledPHI for each PHI in BB, adding to PHIs.
-  void analyzeInitialPHIs(BasicBlock *BB, ModelledPHISet &PHIs,
                           SmallPtrSetImpl<Value *> &PHIContents) {
     for (PHINode &PN : BB->phis()) {
       auto MPHI = ModelledPHI(&PN, RPOTOrder);
